columns_wp.rp_hMpc: projected separation r_p in h^-1 Mpc
columns_wp.wp_hMpc: projected correlation function w_p in h^-1 Mpc

data_source: Guo+2018 Figure 5 (sdss.pdf), top-left panel, blue × symbols, 11<M*<11.5 bin at 0.1<z<0.2
extraction_method: visually digitized from arXiv source sdss.pdf converted to PNG at 150dpi
triple_check: rp values span 1.3-50 h^-1 Mpc (9 log-spaced bins, Δlog r=0.2)
wp values decrease monotonically from 100 to 1.5 h^-1 Mpc — physically expected
wp_err is ~15-20% of wp — consistent with figure error bars
pi_max=100 h^-1 Mpc confirmed from paper TeX source
notes: Planck 2015 cosmology. Published best-fit from Table 2 of Guo+2018.
